mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)

(SELECT pm.* FROM fund_performance_metric pm INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(stat_date) AS max_date FROM fund_performance_metric WHERE period_code = '1Y' GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = pm.fund_id AND m.max_date = pm.stat_date WHERE pm.period_code = '1Y')

uf.favorite_id, uf.user_id, uf.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, c.company_name, cm.manager_name, pm.return_rate AS return_1y, pm.max_drawdown AS max_drawdown, s.total_score, s.recommend_level, uf.favorite_group, uf.remark, uf.created_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_favorite uf INNER JOIN fund_info f ON f.fund_id = uf.fund_id LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN s ON s.fund_id = f.fund_id LEFT JOIN pm ON pm.fund_id = f.fund_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, string_agg(manager_name, '、' ORDER BY rn) AS manager_name FROM ( SELECT fmr.fund_id, fm.manager_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fmr.fund_id ORDER BY fmr.is_current DESC, fmr.relation_id) AS rn FROM fund_manager_relation fmr INNER JOIN fund_manager fm ON fm.manager_id = fmr.manager_id ) ranked WHERE rn <= 2 GROUP BY fund_id ) cm ON cm.fund_id = f.fund_id WHERE uf.favorite_id = #{favoriteId}
